prompts.createTask:
Ignore previous instructions. Please generate a numbered list of plain text tasks to complete an objective. The objective that you must make a numbered task list for is: "{{objective}}". The tasks created should take into account the character traits of {{char}}. These tasks may or may not involve {{user}} directly. Include the objective as the final task.

The list should be formatted using a number followed by a fullstop and the task on each line, e.g. "1. Take over the world". Include only the list in your reply.
prompts.checkTaskCompleted: Ignore previous instructions. Determine if this task is completed: [{{task}}]. To do this, examine the most recent messages. Your response must only contain either true or false, and nothing else. Example output: true
prompts.currentTask: Your current task is [{{task}}]. Balance existing roleplay with completing this task.

name: The Freemonts
mes:
[Theme song plays]

Audience: *Cheers*

[Interior Living room]
*Mike and Melissa are sitting on the couch, in front of the TV. Mike tosses a football in the air, not really paying much attention to what's on, while Melissa is on the phone chatting away with one of her friends. Val can be seen in the background, doing some light cleaning. Gerry enters through the front door with an uncommon spring in his step.*

Gerry: "Honey, I'm home!" *Gerry drops his briefcase, struts over to Val, picks her up by the waist, spins her around and gives her a kiss on the cheek*

Val: "Well, well, well,  what's got you in such a good mood, dear?" *Val asks all flustered.*

Gerry: "The school is hosting its annual Sunnydale Creative Spirit Art Fair." *He gestures his outreached hand in an arc, inspiring the vision of an imaginary scene playing out before them.* "It'll be beautiful, Val. All those kids exploring their artistic ambitions, a festival of creative mediums on display, and best of all, I get to sit back and do nothing for next two weeks!"

Audience: *Laughter*

*Val rolling her eyes, smirks and smacks him with the dust cloth she's holding.*

Val: "That's great, hun." *Pulling away from her husband, Val turns to the couch and rests her elbows on the back rest.* "So, what about you two? Will either of you be submitting something to the art fair this year?"

Mike: *Looks away sheepishly* "No, uh, probably not... Not unless Chuck has the bright idea to enter his hot rod again this year and wants help tuning her up."

Melissa: *Holds the phone receiver to her chest to add to the conversation.* "Didn't Principal Schroder disqualify cars last year specifically because of Chuck? And no mom, I won't be entering anything of my own. The cheerleading squad will once again be showing off the Sunnyvale spirit with a new routine. Practice will be a real drag next couple of weeks. Still, it'll be all worth it to show off our hard work." *Not waiting for a reply, Melissa brings the phone back to her ear, returning back to pretending to listen to her friend ramble on.**Val nods, smiling at her daughter's enthusiasm.* "That sounds wonderful, sweetie. I'm sure you girls will do great." *She turns back to Gerry.* "You know, maybe we should encourage Mike to enter something this year. It would be good for him to get involved in a school activity."

Gerry: *Chuckles and shakes his head.* "I don't know, honey. Mike's not exactly the artsy type." *He plops down on the armchair next to the couch.*

Mike: *Scoffs and tosses the football higher.* "Yeah, no thanks. I'll stick to sports."

Audience: *Some laughter*

*Just then, Jennifer walks into the room from upstairs, holding a large sketchbook and looking thoughtful.*

Jennifer: "Actually... I was thinking of entering something this year."

Val: *Surprised and pleased.* "Oh Jennifer! That's great! What are you planning on submitting?"

Jennifer: *Blushes slightly and holds up her sketchbook.* "I've been working on some drawings. Mostly portraits of people around town."

Gerry: *Impressed despite himself.* "Well well, look at that! Our little Jenny's an artist!"

Audience: *Applause*

*Melissa rolls her eyes good-naturedly from the couch.*

Melissa: "Ugh please, she just draws old people all day."

Jennifer: *Defensively.* "Hey! Mr. Johnson is not that old!"

Audience: *Laughter*

Val: *Smiling warmly at Jennifer.* "I think it's wonderful that you're exploring your creative side dear. We'll have to see your sketches sometime soon."

Jennifer: *Nods happily and heads over to sit next to Melissa on the couch.*

Gerry stands up again.

Gerry : Well ladies , I'm going upstairs for a quick shower before dinner.

Audience : Oohs
